== Notes for [[Item:Q107817|Q107817]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): Rajab 250 AH (August 864 AD)

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yahya_ibn_Umar

Jump to navigationJump to search Yahya ibn Umar ibn Yahya ibn Husayn ibn Zayd ibn Ali Zayn al-Abidin ibn Al-Husayn ibn Ali[1] was an Alid Imam. His mother was Umm al-Husayn Fatimah bint al-Husayn ibn Abdallah ibn Ismail ibn Abdullah ibn Ja`far ibn Abī Tālib. [2] In the days of the Abbasid Caliph Al-Musta'in, he marched out from Kufa and lead an abortive uprising from Kufa in 250 A.H. (864-65 C.E.),[3] but was killed by the Abbasid forces led by Hussain ibn Isma’il, who had been sent to deal with him.... ...

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018889821142

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
